name: Data Quality (validation, freshness, contracts, drift)
description: 数据质量:校验、新鲜度、契约与血缘追踪

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['data_quality','validation','freshness','lineage'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(data quality|data validation|freshness check|data contract|schema check|great expectations|null check|data drift|completeness|anomaly detection)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
